globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PokeAPI/sprites/master/sprites/pokemon/; connect-src 'self' https://pokeapi.co https://unpkg.com;
